zh.lifeSummary: 當Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola於1331年8月27日出生在勒尼 迪 拿坡里時，他的父親Robert de Ursins Orsini37歲，母親Sveva Del Balzo35歲。他於1355年與Jeanne de Sabran結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年2月14日在義大利享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Niccolò
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola was born on 27 August 1331, in Kingdom of Naples, his father, Robert de Ursins Orsini, was 37 and his mother, Sveva Del Balzo, was 35. He married Jeanne de Sabran in 1355. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 February 1399, in Italy, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola est né le 27 août 1331, à Regno di Napoli, son père, Robert de Ursins Orsini, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sveva Del Balzo, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Sabran en 1355. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 février 1399, à Italie, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola am 27. August 1331 in Neapel geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ursins Orsini 37 und seine Mutter Sveva Del Balzo 35. Er hat 1355 Jeanne de Sabran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1399 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Italien.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1331, em Regno di Napoli, seu pai, Robert de Ursins Orsini, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sveva Del Balzo, tinha 35 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola родился 27 августа 1331 г. в местности регно ди наполи, его отцу по имени Robert de Ursins Orsini было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sveva Del Balzo, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Sabran в 1355 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 февраля 1399 г. в местности Италия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola nació el 27 de agosto de 1331, en Regno di Napoli, su papá, Robert de Ursins Orsini, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sveva Del Balzo, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Sabran en 1355. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1399, en Italia, a la edad de 67 años.
